Mock papers · 100 items each

Sit a test before the real day.

Full-length practice papers built to mirror the AFS selection exam — the same question types, the same balance of skills, the same level of difficulty. Pick a set, work through it under exam conditions, then get your score and answers the moment you finish.

Mock paper · 100 items

Sit the test before the real day.

100Questions
100Marks
2:00Hours
9Skill sections

Before you begin

  1. Choose the single best answer for each item. There is no penalty for guessing.
  2. You have 2 hours. The timer runs at the top; the test submits automatically when it reaches zero.
  3. Use the number grid on the right to jump between questions and to see what you have answered.
  4. Answers are hidden until you submit. Your score and full solutions appear only at the end.
  5. Keyboard: press 1–4 to choose, ←/→ to move between questions.
See the test blueprint (what each section measures)
SectionSkillItems
Part 1Conversations — functional language & register15
Part 2Cloze passages — grammar, connectors, collocation10
Part 3Songs & poems — figurative meaning, tone, inference8
Part 4Ads, signs & notices — purpose & scanning12
Part 5Charts & graphs — data & trend vocabulary14
Part 6Maps & plans — directions & spatial language8
Part 7Cartoons — implied meaning & humour6
Part 8Reading passages — main idea, reference, inference21
Part 9Error identification — grammatical accuracy6
